title: Other - Add help guidance to Dividends
summaryBody: We want to give people more of an understanding of Dividends on their first use of FreeAgent. We’ve written a new KB, and now will add a landing zone and a KB link at the bottom of the page.
detailBody: We want to give people more of an understanding of Dividends on their first use of FreeAgent. We’ve written a new KB, and now will add a landing zone and a KB link at the bottom of the page.
